calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-032d PCC-analog metastability scalar -- substrate validation (deterministic arithmetic + agent integration)
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032d PCC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). SD-032d is non-trainable arithmetic, so primary validation is deterministic API + arithmetic checks. C1 baseline_neutral: stability within 0.01 of baseline=0.5 with all-neutral inputs. C2 fatigue_monotone: stability strictly decreasing across drive_level 0.0/0.5/1.0 (falsification-signature direct test). C3 offline_recency_monotone: stability decreasing as steps_since_offline grows 0/250/500/1000 (saturates at window). C4 offline_reset_hook: note_offline_entry resets counter + restores stability. C5 success_ema_convergence: ema > 0.95 after 200 outcomes at alpha=0.02. C6 threshold_modulation: SalienceCoordinator effective_threshold strictly increasing in pcc_stability across 0.1/0.5/0.9 (MECH-259 wiring confirmed). C7 agent_integration: REEAgent select_action populates _pcc_last_tick AND injects pcc_stability into coordinator before tick. C8 backward_compat: use_pcc_analog=False -> agent.pcc is None and convenience hooks no-op. PASS = all 8 checks. Behavioural falsification of rest-driven mode-switch-rate signature requires combined SD-032a+SD-032c+SD-032d 4-arm 2x2 follow-up once cluster fully landed. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: Q-034 hazard/resource threshold retest (supersedes V3-EXQ-288 criteria_null)
items.notes: Retest of V3-EXQ-288 (criteria_null). Tightened design with direct goal_reach/harm_exposure/entropy per grid point. 5x3 grid: hazard_density in {0.05,0.10,0.15,0.20,0.25} x resource_density in {0.04,0.08,0.12} = 15 points x 2 seeds = 30 runs, 30 warmup + 30 eval eps each at 200 steps. Uses SD-018 resource_proximity_head and SD-012 drive_weight=2.0 (post-288 substrate). Acceptance: C1 goal_reach monotonically decreasing in hazard_density within >=2/3 resource-density columns; C2 at least one grid point where goal_reach crosses 0.5; C3 all 15 points complete with non-null metrics (the criteria_null fix); C4 avoidance signature at high-hazard/low-resource (diagnostic). PASS = C1 AND C2 AND C3. experiment_purpose=evidence. supersedes V3-EXQ-288.

items.title: SD-032b dACC full pipeline -- E3 harm_eval + terrain trained, terrain fix: min-residue candidate
items.notes: Full-pipeline fix for EXQ-445 monostrategy collapse (root cause: E3 never trained; untrained E3 always selects same action -> entropy=0). Fix: P0 trains E1, E3 harm_eval, terrain_prior (min-residue candidate, not E3-selected), and world-forward. P1 trains E2_harm_a on frozen encoder. P2 eval with pure policy. Also fixes terrain_prior inversion (from ARC-007 diagnosis): terrain trained on minimum-residue candidate from candidate set, not E3's selected trajectory. 3 seeds x 2 conditions (OFF vs ON_INDEPENDENT) x 280 eps x 120 steps. PASS: C1 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 in >=2/3 seeds; C2 |entropy_ON - entropy_OFF|>=0.1 in >=2/3 seeds; C3 ON entropy >= OFF entropy in >=2/3 seeds. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-032b dACC diversity: epsilon-greedy exploration during training (minimal intervention)
items.notes: Narrow hypothesis test: is the EXQ-445 monostrategy a pure training artifact breakable without changing the training objective? Adds epsilon=0.1 random action injection during P0+P1 only (EPSILON_TRAIN=0.1, EPSILON_EVAL=0.0). Does NOT add full E3 training (unlike 445a). Preserves ARC-033/ARC-058 3-arm design (OFF, ON_INDEPENDENT, ON_SHARED). Same P0=50, P1=100, P2=30 as EXQ-445. Same PASS criteria: C1 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 in >=2/3 seeds; C2 |entropy_ON - entropy_OFF|>=0.1; C3 ON entropy >= OFF entropy. If PASS: monostrategy was training artifact. If FAIL: monostrategy is fundamental (environment too simple or E3 always prefers one action). experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-032b dACC larger environment (14x14, 5 hazards, 7 resources) + full pipeline training
items.notes: Multi-arm larger-environment variant. Tests whether dACC behavioral effect requires richer environment with more action diversity. Environment: size=14, num_hazards=5, num_resources=7, steps_per_ep=150 (was 10x10, 3 hazards, 4 resources, 120 steps). Full pipeline training same as 445a (E1, harm_eval, terrain, world-forward in P0; E2_harm_a in P1; epsilon=0.1 during training). 3 seeds x 2 conditions (OFF vs ON_INDEPENDENT). Same PASS criteria as 445a. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-033a lateral-PFC-analog landing validation (diagnostic -- substrate wiring of MECH-261 primary consumer)
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-033a LateralPFCAnalog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-20). Primary consumer of MECH-261 write-gate registry on SD-032a SalienceCoordinator; instantiates MECH-262 rule-selective persistence. SD-033a is gate-modulated EMA + frozen-random zeroed-last-Linear bias head, so primary validation is deterministic API + arithmetic. 5 sub-tests: UC1 instantiation (REEAgent with use_lateral_pfc_analog=True exposes agent.lateral_pfc; rule_state buffer shape [1, rule_dim]). UC2 gate modulates update rate (gate=1 delta > 100x gate=0 delta; gate=0 freeze < 1e-6). UC3 bias zero at init (compute_bias returns exactly-zero [K] vector with non-zero rule_state; validates zeroed-last-Linear contract, not biological bias). UC4 backward compat (use_lateral_pfc_analog=False -> agent.lateral_pfc is None; SD-033a tick block skipped in select_action). UC5 reset clears rule_state (agent.reset() zeroes rule_state via lateral_pfc.reset path). PASS = all 5 UCs. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Does NOT test biological SD-033a signatures (i/iii/iv); bias head is untrained (training-dependent emergence deferred until A2 alternative is considered -- see task_inbox lit-pull). Signature (ii) distractor-resistant persistence is exercised indirectly via gate=0 update-suppression check. evidence_direction=diagnostic.

items.title: MECH-091 salient-event phase-reset discriminative pair
items.notes: Discriminative pair: PHASE_RESET_ON (E3 heartbeat resets on harm contact) vs PHASE_RESET_ABLATED (continuous counter). Tests MECH-091: phase-reset of E3 heartbeat on salient events improves harm_eval discrimination quality by aligning harm signals with cycle boundaries. 2 seeds x 2 conditions, 400 warmup + 50 eval eps each. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_on>=0.04, C2 per-seed delta>=0.02, C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm>=20, C5 n_resets>=10. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: MECH-104 volatility interrupt -- surprise-gate matched-seed discriminative pair
items.notes: Matched-seed discriminative pair for MECH-104: SURPRISE_GATE_ON (running_variance spike fires on unexpected harm only) vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED. Tests that unexpected harm events selectively raise commitment uncertainty enabling de-commitment. 2 seeds, 400 warmup + 50 eval, 6 pre-registered criteria. experiment_purpose=evidence.

items.title: SD-016 cue_action_proj forward-path probe -- instrument extract_cue_context -> E3.select chain (supersedes V3-EXQ-449)
items.notes: Diagnostic forward-path probe for SD-016 cue_action_proj. EXQ-449 confirmed weights train under supervised arm but action_bias_divergence stays at 0.0 -- something downstream zeroes the signal before it reaches E3.select. EXQ-449a instruments the full forward path (extract_cue_context -> ContextMemory attention -> cue_action_proj -> hippocampal.propose_trajectories -> E3.select) under three eval regimes to localise the blocker. Regimes: g1 supervised-active W_std, g2 frozen W_std, g3 frozen W_no_detach (monkeypatched _e1_tick bypasses detach of action_bias, terrain_weight, and z_world input). Single seed 42, P0=25 encoder warmup + P1=50 supervised finetune per variant. Two training variants (W_std, W_no_detach) -> 1 seed x 2 conditions. Instrumentation: action_bias norm / per-channel std, terrain_weight norm, ao_target norm, attention entropy, ContextMemory slot diversity. Acceptance: C1 diagnosis_localised (>=1 offender tensor below threshold in g2), C2 detach_isolated bonus (g3 div > 0.05), C3 context_memory_pre_zero (>=80 percent g2 coverage > 1e-3), C4 supervised_target_sanity (>=80 percent P1 coverage > 1e-3). primary_pass = C1 AND C3 AND C4 (localises blocker). experiment_purpose=diagnostic (excluded from governance scoring). Unblocks EXQ-418b successor once specific forward-path offender identified.

items.title: SD-034 closure-operator landing -- verified-but-not-released (EXP-0156 / ocd4)
items.notes: SD-034 closure-operator landing diagnostic (ocd4 row 'verified-but-not-released'). Six sub-tests (all arithmetic + API): UC1 backward compat (use_closure_operator=False -> agent.closure_operator is None); UC2 wiring (closure_event affinity registered on SalienceCoordinator with internal_planning weight > 0); UC3 beta release on fire (bypass_mode_conditioning + beta elevated -> beta_gate released, event fired); UC4 targeted No-Go installed (MECH-260 _action_history gets nogo_injection_count copies of the completed action class); UC5 dACC pe reset (_pe_ema=None post-fire); UC6 mode-conditioning blocks fire (current_mode not in allowed_closure_modes -> NOT fired, beta stays up). PASS = all 6. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md 'verified-but-not-released'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic (excluded from governance scoring via manifest experiment_purpose field). Behavioral variant with full E3 task loop deferred -- requires phased rule_state training + task variant with observable completion signature.

items.title: SD-034 closure-operator landing -- satisficing / residue discharge (EXP-0162 / ocd4)
items.notes: SD-034 closure-operator satisficing / residue-discharge landing diagnostic (ocd4 row 'satisficing / No-Go thresholding'). Five sub-tests (all arithmetic + API): UC1 nearby_attenuation (ResidueField.discharge_domain halves in-domain weight within radius*bandwidth); UC2 far_centers_spared (domain scoping preserves distant weights); UC3 invariant_preserved (multiplicative decay clamped at 1e-6 floor -- 'residue cannot be erased' holds after 200 halvings); UC4 closure_fire_triggers_discharge (end-to-end through ClosureOperator._fire, residue_centers_discharged >= 1, ratio ~0.5); UC5 closure_fire_distant_spares_residue (z_world far from residue -> unchanged). PASS = all 5. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md 'satisficing / No-Go thresholding'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Behavioral variant (tolerance-band completion env -- bimodal vs smooth satisficing contrast) deferred: requires new env variant not yet on any roadmap item.

items.title: MECH-268 dACC conflict-saturation landing -- conflict saturation (EXP-0159 / ocd4)
items.notes: MECH-268 dACC conflict-saturation landing diagnostic (ocd4 row 'conflict saturation'). Seven sub-tests (all arithmetic + API): UC1 backward compat (saturation OFF -> sat_factor==1.0 even with sustained outcomes); UC2 grace honoured (n_rec <= grace -> sat_factor==1.0); UC3 activates past grace (sat_factor < 1.0 once n_rec > grace); UC4 monotone in recurrences (sat_factor strictly decreases with each additional identical outcome); UC5 mixed outcomes spare saturation (alternating classes -> per-class recurrence below activation); UC6 ClosureOperator._fire() resets _outcome_history (post-closure sat_factor==1.0); UC7 dACC.forward() bundle exposes pe_unsaturated + saturation_factor + outcome_recurrence diagnostics with bundle['pe'] == pe_unsaturated * saturation_factor. PASS = all 7. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md row 'conflict saturation'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Behavioural arm (500+ step sustained-outcome task with mode-switch trigger rate) deferred -- requires phased rule_state training and an env variant not yet on any roadmap item. evidence_direction_per_claim splits SD-034 (UC6 only) from MECH-268 / SD-032b; MECH-258 tagged as non_contributory (composes with the saturation pipeline but landing does not directly assert the precision-weighting path).

items.title: SD-034 x MECH-268 four-arm landing -- commitment vs contradiction (EXP-0164 / ocd4)
items.notes: SD-034 x MECH-268 four-arm landing diagnostic (ocd4 row 'commitment vs contradiction'). Six sub-tests (all arithmetic + API) covering the four arms of the EXP-0164 spec: UC1 Arm D (both OFF -> baseline, no closure firing, no saturation); UC2 Arm A (both ON -> closure releases beta + No-Go injected + pe EMA reset + outcome history reset; sat_factor returns to 1.0 post-closure); UC3 Arm B (SD-034 ON, MECH-268 OFF -> closure fires + releases without needing saturation; bundle pe == pe_unsaturated); UC4 Arm C (SD-034 OFF, MECH-268 ON -> closure 'skipped:disabled', beta stays elevated; saturation still attenuates pe); UC5 mode-conditioning blocks closure but not saturation (falsifiability predicate: SD-034 mode-gating does NOT gate MECH-268); UC6 closure-after-saturation interaction (closure cycle uses still-attenuated pe but next cycle starts unsaturated -- forward-looking, not retroactive). PASS = all 6. Anchor plan: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/sd033_governance_plan.md. Source: docs/thoughts/2026-04-20_ocd4.md row 'commitment vs contradiction'. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Behavioural arm (env counter-evidence injection + release-type distribution / time-to-release / post-release residue patterning across all four arms) deferred -- requires env extension not on roadmap. evidence_direction_per_claim splits SD-034 (UC2/UC3/UC5/UC6), MECH-268 (UC2/UC4/UC5/UC6), MECH-090 (UC2/UC3/UC4 -- beta release / latch checks).
